name: Close Craft
description: An intimate focus on hands at work, the quiet concentration of making something by hand.
hld_patterns: {setting}. A single maker hunched over their work, hands busy and precise, face soft with quiet concentration
{setting}. Close on weathered hands shaping something delicate, the maker's face a portrait of focused calm behind them
{setting}. Tight framing on two craftspeople working side by side, their hands moving in practiced rhythm

1: {subject}, center frame, facing downward toward their hands, head and shoulders filling the upper third
2: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right and downward, closer and larger
{subject}, right third of frame, facing left and downward, slightly behind in depth

background_pool: soft-focus workbench scattered with tools and shavings, warm amber lamplight pooling across wood surfaces, small objects dissolving into golden bokeh
blurred kitchen interior, steam curling through warm light, copper and ceramic shapes melting into soft domestic color
out-of-focus studio with canvases and brushes along the walls, afternoon sun catching dust motes, paint-stained surfaces reduced to gentle smears of color
indistinct cozy study, stacks of paper and open books blurred into cream and brown tones, desk lamp casting a warm circle of soft light
action_pool: both hands engaged in fine manipulation, fingertips pinching something small, wrists steady and hovering
one hand gripping a tool low, knuckles firm, the other hand pressing flat to steady the work
rolling a small object between thumb and fingers, hand tilted slightly, gaze focused down
wiping the back of one hand across the forehead, the other hand still poised mid-task, fingers curled
carefully pressing the heel of the palm down, fingers arched, wrist locked in precise control
curling fingers to grip something between them, thumb pressing down, forearm taut with controlled force
brushing loose strands of hair from the face with the back of the wrist, eyes never leaving the work
drawing one finger slowly along a line or edge, the rest of the hand fanned out for balance
both palms cupped together forming a cradle, thumbs crossed, shoulders hunched in concentration
pinching something between thumb and forefinger, lifting it delicately to eye level, other fingers fanned
